title: Large-Scale Models Path
description: Build fluency in Large-Scale Models inside Model Architecture by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: LINE (Large-Scale Information Network Embedding)
steps.summary: LINE (Large-Scale Information Network Embedding) belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Start after Large Model Architecture and LINE Embedding.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Scale.ai
steps.summary: Scale.ai belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture. It opens into AI in Multi-Scale Systems.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Foundation Model
steps.summary: Foundation Model belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Compare it with Visual Foundation Model and Large Foundation Models. It opens into Large Foundation Models and Visual Foundation Model.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: MaX-DeepLab-Large
steps.summary: MaX-DeepLab-Large belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Start after Large Model Architecture and MaX-DeepLab.

steps.title: Large World Models
steps.summary: Large World Models belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Start after Large Model Architecture and World Model.

steps.title: Large Foundation Models
steps.summary: Large Foundation Models belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Start after Foundation Model and Large Model Architecture.

steps.title: Large Model Architecture
steps.summary: Large Model Architecture belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Compare it with YOLOv8-Large and YOLOv5-Large. It opens into GTE-large and HAT-Large.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: AI in Multi-Scale Systems
steps.summary: AI in Multi-Scale Systems belongs to the Model Architecture area of AI/ML, within Large-Scale Models. It sits inside Model Architecture / Large-Scale Models. Start after Scale.ai and AI in Architecture.
